action_text: Click the "Expense Lines" link under the Cost application
rationale: Directly opens the required module from the All menu to start filtering expense lines.

action_text: Press Enter in the All menu filter to open the top matching result
rationale: If keyboard navigation is supported, pressing Enter in the filter may open the highlighted module result.

action_text: Press Arrow Down in the All menu filter to highlight the first result
rationale: Moves focus from the filter input to the first search result so it can be opened with Enter next.

action_text: Click the "Cost" application toggle to expand/collapse its modules
rationale: Ensures the Cost application node is expanded so the Expense Lines module is visible and clickable.

action_text: Click the "Clear filter" button in the All menu
rationale: Resets the filter text in case the list is not updating correctly, enabling a fresh search for the module.
